block_00: Plan your trading approach in advance!
block_01: The end of the year is a good time to recap your outcome from 2020 and plan your trading approach for the next year. Preparing in advance will give you time to consider seasonal changes and other factors like major events.
block_02: Check the article to learn about the January Effect, the months of 2021 that may be considered as more successful and the important factors that you may take into account when preparing your trading plan for next year.
block_03: Read the article until the end and let us know what you think in the comments below!
